violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the floor mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, vegetation, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

The area outside the kitchen door has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The physical facilities must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Ceiling lights in the kitchen were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

Chicken and pasta observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Single service items observed on the floor in the ice cream area during reorganization. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
A folding portable card table observed in the kitchen. Commercial grade equipment is required. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Ceiling lights in the kitchen were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

The area outside the kitchen door has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the ice cream area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the toilet room. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and floor mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items must be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Pulled pork, chicken, and sliced meats & cheeses observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the ice cream area, kitchen, and walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses in the kitchen and ice cream area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the ice cream area and behind the front service counter. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
The shelf above the food prep area was not in good repair, with peeling paint. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Wood is used in the construction of shelves in the ice cream area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
A folding portable card table was observed in the kitchen. Commercial grade equipment is required. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:ice cream areasmall prep unitpizza prep unitwalk in shelvesmixercan opener can opener basecan opener/can storage rack tablekitchen shelvesdry ingredient binsChest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The area outside the kitchen door has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and ice cream area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The kitchen door and frame has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Ceiling lights in the kitchen were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

The toilet room including on the wall pipes has an accumulation of soil residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
